blockingIssues.description: Codegen Writer still lacks path traversal containment checks; generated paths can escape the target output subtree.
Act3 Executor still does not route execution_mode :pi through real codegen execution path (Task.Agent/Codegen.Writer).
Map slot handlers in project.ex still convert untrusted route params via String.to_atom/1 (atom exhaustion risk).
Frontend API helpers in web/src/lib/api.ts still do not surface non-2xx server error bodies to callers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit atom-safety rule: never call String.to_atom/1 on externally controlled input (path/query/body); require allowlists or existing-atom/bounded mapping.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Unsafe String.to_atom(slot_str) remains in lib/bropilot/api/handlers/project.ex map-slot handlers and was re-flagged as blocking in rerun review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Gate scrutiny re-runs on completed fix features with transcript/handoff availability before dispatching reviewer runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-scrutiny-m1-security-and-wiring had no workerSessionId/completedWorkerSessionId; reviewer had to inspect raw repo state without feature-scoped transcript.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh stale factual claims about endpoint count and domain-page availability to match current codebase state.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observed architecture docs still claim 34 endpoints and missing domain page while router/domain page state differs.
